title: Cuban Link Classic Ring
description: Refined domed band with a recessed Cuban braid channel, polished exterior edges, and oxidized depth for timeless contrast. Hand-cast and finished in Del Rio, Texas.
overview: The Cuban Link Classic Ring represents the foundational aesthetic of the collection. Its domed 7 mm profile and deep-set Cuban braid deliver a clean, bold, and timeless silhouette.
specifications: Crafted: Hand-cast in Del Rio, Texas
notes: Customization Available (inner band engraving / scripture / name’s / etc.)

title: Cuban Link Statement Ring (Thick)
description: The Thick Statement Ring is the bold centerpiece of the Cuban Link Collection. A full 10 mm domed band with a personalized name-plate engraving panel, framed by three total channels—a large Cuban braid in the center and two smaller Cuban braids on each side. Its sculptural weight, polished edges, and deep oxidized recesses give it a high-end, standout presence. Cast & finished in Del Rio, Texas.
overview: The Thick Statement Ring is the bold centerpiece of the Cuban Link Collection. Its 10 mm profile, multi-channel construction, and deep Cuban braids deliver maximum visual impact with refined craftsmanship.
specifications: Finish: Oxidized recess + polished raised edges
Design: Triple-channel (one large & two small braids)
Crafted: Cast & finished in Del Rio, Texas

title: Cuban Link Statement Ring (Thin)
description: The Statement Ring (Thin) carries the same bold Cuban Link design language as its Thick counterpart, refined into a lighter, more wearable form. A 10 mm domed profile features a centered engraving panel framed by three sculpted channels—one large Cuban braid flanked by two smaller braids—delivering full statement presence with improved everyday comfort.
overview: The Cuban Link Statement Ring (Thin) is engineered for those who want bold visual impact without the added weight. Retaining the full sculptural depth of the Statement design, this version offers a balanced feel ideal for daily wear while preserving the unmistakable Cuban Link presence.
specifications: Design: Triple-channel layout (1 large + 2 small braids)
Crafted: Cast & finished in Del Rio, Texas
notes: Same bold structure as the Thick version

title: Cuban Link Twin Ring
description: The Twin Ring delivers symmetry and refined detail through a 7 mm domed band divided into two sculpted Cuban braids, separated by a clean central ridge. Diamond-pattern etched outer walls add depth and texture, while polished edges and oxidized recesses create crisp contrast. A balanced Cuban Link design, hand-cast and finished in Del Rio, Texas.
overview: The Cuban Link Twin Ring emphasizes balance and structure, pairing dual Cuban braids with a sharp center ridge for a clean, architectural profile. Lightweight yet visually intricate, it’s designed for everyday wear while maintaining strong Cuban Link identity and craftsmanship.
specifications: Design: Dual small Cuban braids with center ridge
Crafted: Cast & finished in Del Rio, Texas

title: Cuban Link Signature Ring
description: The Signature Ring places personalization at the center — a raised name-plate panel set into a 7 mm domed band, bordered by a clean structural channel and a bold large Cuban braid. Modern, refined, and unmistakably personal, this piece blends identity with Cuban Link craftsmanship.
overview: A personalized Cuban Link design built around a raised signature name-plate, balanced by a bold large braid and clean architectural lines. Designed to carry identity, craftsmanship, and everyday wearability.
specifications: Design: Name-plate centered with large Cuban braid
Crafted: Cast & finished in Del Rio, Texas

title: Cuban Link Origin’s Ring
description: The Origin’s Ring is the very first Cuban Link design ever sculpted — the foundation from which the entire collection was built. A continuous large Cuban braid wraps a 7 mm band, preserving the earliest design language and original CDLA craftsmanship.
overview: A pure, uninterrupted Cuban Link braid representing the beginning of the CDLA design language. Minimalist, bold, and rooted in the original craftsmanship that started the entire collection.
specifications: Crafted: Cast & finished in Del Rio, Texas
